message:
feat(fsqlite-harness): expand test harness with eprocess, TLA refinements, and new tests

Significant expansion of the integration test harness:

- eprocess.rs (new): external process harness for multi-process WAL
  concurrency tests — spawns child processes with controlled VFS
  configurations for exercising SHM lock contention scenarios
- tla.rs: refine TLA+ model-checking integration helpers for MVCC
  invariant verification
- fslab.rs: expand slab allocator with additional buffer pool sizes
  and alignment guarantees for benchmark reproducibility
- lib.rs: wire up eprocess module and update harness public API
- Cargo.toml: add new dependencies for process spawning and IPC

Test updates:
- commit_repair_async.rs: refactor to use new commit repair module API
  with cleaner test fixture setup (~300 lines simplified)
- cx_sealed_enforcement.rs: update sealed trait test expectations for
  new trait hierarchy
- mvcc_alien_verification.rs: update verification tests for expanded
  MVCC lifecycle types
- trace_monoid.rs (new): monoid-based trace composition tests for
  verifying WAL frame ordering invariants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
